arts.ttl: Mbappe 'flying' high at Real and now wants to 'make history'
arts.sum: Real Madrid forward Kylian Mbappe's goal against Manchester City in the first leg may have come from a scrappy finish but there was nothing fortunate about his hat-trick in the return leg at Santiago Bernabeu on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: VIDEO: REACTION: Real Madrid Draw Atletico Madrid In The Champions League Round-of-16
arts.sum: Listeners and watchers are encouraged to sign up as a Member on Patreon to ensure they don’t miss out on the bonus content that Managing Madrid posts multiple times per week. In a recently released exclusive Members-only podcast on Patreon, Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani, Angelo Valdes, and Lucas Navarrete answered questions sent in by fans in the weekly mailbag.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid learn result of Jude Bellingham red card appeal ahead of Girona clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid learn the outcome of their decision to appeal Jude Bellingham's two-match ban for swearing at a match official in last weekend's draw with Osasuna.

They crumbled after the late equalizer, having already begun to savor their first Champions League title following Godín’s goal. A feast of joy for Cholo, Madrid’s first case of indigestion in the post-Cristiano era.

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone ‘not interested in history’ ahead of Real Madrid reunion
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid looked destined to be drawn up against rivals Real Madrid in the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 next month. Los Blancos powered through the playoffs to once again end Manchester City’s European campaign with wins home and away for Carlo Ancelotti.
